title: hieracium stellatum
intro: Hieracium stellatum, also known as the mountain hawk's-beard, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Hieracium stellatum include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues, making it a popular choice among herbalists. Herbal preparations of Hieracium stellatum typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the roots and leaves, which can be consumed as teas or added to salves for topical use.
